name: scsynthdef-compiler-ugens-browser
description: Browser-side documentation viewer for the UGens bundled with scsynthdef-compiler. Loads the cargo-component + jco build and renders every UGen's metadata.

scripts.build:wasm: cd ../.. && cargo component build --release --features component --target wasm32-wasip1 && jco transpile ../../target/wasm32-wasip1/release/scsynthdef_compiler.wasm -o examples/frontend/pkg
